_note: Raw upstream reference data vendored into this repo for durability. The site does not depend on network access to upstream mirrors at build time — these files are the source of truth for the derived filtered JSONs one directory up. Regenerate the filtered subsets with `npm run refresh:reference` (pass `--fetch` to pull fresh copies from upstream instead of using the local files).

files.description: One JSON object per line per hanzi. Fields: character, pinyin[], decomposition (IDS), radical, etymology, definition. Derived from Unihan + CJKlib. Used for frontmatter cross-check and prose decomposition validation.
Traditional → simplified character mapping. Tab-separated: trad<TAB>simp1 simp2 ...
Simplified → traditional character mapping. Tab-separated: simp<TAB>trad1 trad2 ...
